tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Antarctica is the coldest and windiest place 1.1. _________ Earth. Although no one lives there permanently, it 1.2. _________ visited by scientists who stay for months at a time to carry out their research. Life on the frozen continent is not 1.3. _________ easy as it might sound. During the long winter, the sun does not rise 1.4. _________ several months, and temperatures can drop below minus sixty degrees. The researchers 1.5. _________ to wear many layers of special clothing whenever they go outside. Fresh food is difficult 1.6. _________ get, so most of it has to be flown in. Despite 1.7. _________ these hardships, many scientists love working there. The continent is home 1.8. _________ penguins, seals and whales, 1.9. _________ are perfectly suited to the cold. Few other places on the planet are 1.10. _________ wild and beautiful.
